THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IN PARTITION - SUBJECT PROPERTY COMMONLY NOWN AS 611 CAMPBELL AVE., S.F., CA. SALE IS STAYED UNTIL JAN. 1, 2010 PROVIDED THAT KATE ROGERS PAYS CLIFFORD GUIDRY JR. THE SUM OF $450.00 PER MONTH AS RENT COMMECING 7-24-09 AND MADE PAYABLE AS SET FORTH IN JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. UPON SALE OF PROPERTY, PROCEEDS WILL BE DIVIDED 50% TO PLAINTIFF AND 50% TO MS. ROGERS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER TERMS AS SET FORTH. (NO SASE - 604 OUTBOX)
